description: Weighted Voting classification with Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation
author: Ken Ross, Broad Institute
plan:
## WeightedVotingXValidation GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
WeightedVotingXValidation is a GenePattern module that Weighted Voting classification with Leave-One-Out Cross-Validation

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 7 parameters:
- Required: data.filename, class.filename, num.features, feature.selection.statistic, pred.results.file, feature.summary.file
- Optional: min.std

### 3. Command Line
```
<java> <java_flags> -cp <libdir>gp-modules.jar<path.separator><libdir>wvxval.jar org.genepattern.modules.wvxval.WeightedVotingXValidation -t<data.filename> -c<class.filename> -o<pred.results.file> -n<num.features> -f<feature.summary.file> -S<feature.selection.statistic> -M<min.std>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: data.filename
parameters.description: Dataset input data file - res, gct, odf

parameters.name: feature.selection.statistic
parameters.description: statistic to use to perform feature selection

parameters.name: min.std
parameters.description: minimum standard deviation if feature selection statistic includes min std option

parameters.name: pred.results.file
parameters.description: Prediction results output file name - odf

parameters.name: feature.summary.file
parameters.description: Feature summary output file name - odf
